case_for: Kelce has three games of 20+ points in his last six outings, showing he still has weekly ceiling upside within the Chiefs' offense.
case_against: His volatility is stark with two sub-13 point duds (wk11 at 2.8 and wk7 at 5.7) in the same span, and his most recent game landed right at the threshold, suggesting inconsistent target share.
